name: recall_aide_baseline_maps_si7_cm6
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 11.SI/ (CTP-014_aide): a script(1) capture of `aide --check` and the /etc/aide.conf rule set. AIDE file-integrity baselining is SI-7 (Software/Firmware/Information Integrity) and CM-6 (Configuration Settings monitoring). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; AIDE rule vocabulary ('aide.db.gz', 'p+i+n+u+g+s+sha256') has near-zero overlap with 'integrity verification'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor SI-3 present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The organization employs integrity verification tools to detect unauthorized changes to software, firmware, and information.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Deploy a file integrity monitoring tool with a known-good baseline.
objectives.assessment_procedures: Examine the integrity verification configuration and baseline.

objectives.text: The organization establishes and documents configuration settings for information technology products and monitors and controls changes to those settings.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Establish a configuration baseline and detect deviations.
objectives.assessment_procedures: Examine the configuration baseline and deviation detection.

objectives.text: The organization employs malicious code protection mechanisms.

evidence.title: CTP-014 AIDE integrity check capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-06 10:05:11-0500
[root@app01 ~]# grep -v '^#' /etc/aide.conf | grep -E 'database|sha|rule'
database=file:/var/lib/aide/aide.db.gz
database_out=file:/var/lib/aide/aide.db.new.gz
NORMAL = p+i+n+u+g+s+m+c+md5+sha256
/boot   NORMAL
/bin    NORMAL
/sbin   NORMAL
/etc    NORMAL
[root@app01 ~]# aide --check
AIDE 0.16
Start timestamp: 2026-03-06 10:05 (AIDE 0.16)
AIDE found differences between database and filesystem!!
Summary:
  Total number of entries:      48211
  Added entries:                0
  Removed entries:              0
  Changed entries:              2
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-06 10:06:40-0500
